# Daggers
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Daggers&prop=wikitext

'''Daggers''' are used by [[Rogue]]s, [[Assassin]]s and [[Trickster]]s.

==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this [https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/daggers link].'''''

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Destructor Dagger|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Dagger of Goddess of Goddesses|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Firebreather's Tail|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Shadowscale's Horn|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Dagger of the Endless Void|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|PoOoOoOokkErrRr|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Loki's Dagger|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Claw of the Beast|p}}
|}
===Galactic {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Cometstrike Dirk|g}}
|}
